data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Accommodations management (extra time, breaks)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions accommodations management, but it does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks to demonstrate that this functionality is implemented or operational. Therefore, the evidence fails to meet the requirement, resulting in a gap.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of accommodations management (extra time, breaks) through API reads or state checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
